title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CALABASA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LABO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO PAARALANG BAYAN NG EUGENIO DASCO, SR.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 12064 / 65 OG No. 9, 2073 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5029, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CALABASA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LABO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO PAARALANG BAYAN NG EUGENIO DASCO, SR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Calabasa Elementary School in the Municipality of Labo, Province of Camarines Norte, is hereby changed to Paaralang Bayan ng Eugenio Dasco Sr.

SEC. 2.

This Act shall take effect upon

its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
